description: Multi-bank refactor — bank='vietcombank' param, bank-aware template + output paths, slugified company directory

lc_data_summary.applicant_name: Viet Nam Technology Import-Export Joint Stock Company

key_changes.config.py: Added BANK_VCB/BIDV/VIETINBANK/DEFAULT constants, get_bank_template_path(), slugify_company(), get_bank_output_dir()
key_changes.state.py: Added bank: str and company_slug: str fields to LCAgentState
key_changes.lc_application.py: issuing_bank_name/bic changed from hardcoded VCB defaults to Optional[str] = None
key_changes.lc_rules_validator.py: Removed block that injected Vietcombank as default issuing bank
key_changes.docx_filler.py: _fill_header uses bank_branch/vcb_branch/'' instead of hardcoded 'Ha Noi Branch'
key_changes.graph.py: run_lc_application() gains bank: str | None param; passes bank and company_slug to initial state
key_changes.node_fill.py: Uses get_bank_template_path(bank) and get_bank_output_dir(bank, company_slug); returns company_slug in state
key_changes.tests: test_docx_filler.py updated template path; test_config.py (8 tests) created; test_ete.py gains test_ete_multi_bank_vcb
